summary: The diff implements all 5 requirements with good coverage. REQ-1 through REQ-5 are addressed across the modified files. Minor gaps exist around ReevesHeroSection/ReevesAboutSection/ReevesFooter components (not shown in diff) and some specific AC items that cannot be fully verified from truncated diffs, but overall the implementation is comprehensive.

missing_requirements.requirement: Remove 'Karen' from ReevesAboutSection and any other components displaying testimonials
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows TestimonialsSection and HoustonTestimonialsSection updated, but ReevesAboutSection is not present in the diff. It was explicitly called out in the requirement.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update ReevesHeroSection headline to 'Conroe Agents: Get 12+ Quotes/Month'
missing_requirements.reason: HeroSection and HoustonHeroSection are updated in the diff, but ReevesHeroSection is not present in the diff files. The requirement explicitly lists all three hero components.

missing_requirements.requirement: Process Proof section appears on all public-facing pages including Reeves variant
missing_requirements.reason: ProcessProofSection is integrated into Footer.tsx and HoustonFooter.tsx, but ReevesFooter is not shown in the diff. If a separate Reeves variant page exists without this footer integration, that page would be missing the section.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update FloatingCallButton tel: href to tel:+18325551234 and update ContactSection/ReevesContactSection phone
missing_requirements.reason: The diff does not show FloatingCallButton, ContactSection, or ReevesContactSection being modified. The useBusinessInfo hook default is updated, but direct hardcoded values in these components are not confirmed changed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update ReevesHeroSection CTA button and HoustonQuoteForm submit button to urgency text
missing_requirements.reason: ReevesHeroSection and HoustonQuoteForm are not present in the diff. The requirement explicitly called out these components.
